permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to fetch external web content (MCP protocol docs, Python SDK README, TypeScript SDK README). Allow this fetch?
This skill needs to read local reference files (e.g., mcp_best_practices.md, python_mcp_server.md, node_mcp_server.md, evaluation.md). Allow reading within the workspace?
This skill needs to create or modify source files (server implementation files, evaluation XML, package.json, tsconfig.json). Allow writing within the workspace?
This skill needs to read version-controlled source code files to review and refine the MCP server implementation. Allow reading source code?
This skill needs to create or modify version-controlled source code files for the MCP server. Allow writing source code?
This skill needs to run shell commands (e.g., npm run build, python -m py_compile, timeout 5s python server.py). Allow shell execution?
This skill may call external third-party APIs when building and testing MCP server integrations. Allow external API calls?
This skill reads environment variables for secure handling of authentication tokens and API keys. Allow reading environment variables?
This skill loads external content (MCP protocol docs, SDK READMEs, local reference guides) into the agent session. Allow loading external context?
This skill inspects available MCP tool schemas and metadata during evaluation (Phase 4 tool inspection). Allow reading tool metadata?
This skill invokes registered tools during evaluation (read-only operations to explore data for evaluation questions). Allow invoking tools?
This skill may start the MCP server process in tmux for testing. Allow creating host processes?
This skill invokes MCP tools via the Model Context Protocol server (evaluation harness, read-only content exploration). Allow MCP tool execution?
